tEn: A Style-Based Generator Architecture for Generative Adversarial Networks
tZh: 一种基于风格的生成对抗网络生成器架构
sEn: A style-based generator architecture for GANs enables unsupervised separation of high-level attributes and stochastic variation, improving quality and disentanglement.
sZh: 一种基于风格的生成器架构实现了高层属性与随机变化的无监督分离，提升了生成质量和解耦能力。
absEn: We propose an alternative generator architecture for generative adversarial networks, borrowing from style transfer literature. The new architecture leads to an automatically learned, unsupervised separation of high-level attributes (e.g., pose and identity when trained on human faces) and stochastic variation in the generated images (e.g., freckles, hair), and it enables intuitive, scale-specific control of the synthesis. The new generator improves the state-of-the-art in terms of traditional distribution quality metrics, leads to demonstrably better interpolation properties, and also better disentangles the latent factors of variation. To quantify interpolation quality and disentanglement, we propose two new, automated methods that are applicable to any generator architecture. Finally, we introduce a new, highly varied and high-quality dataset of human faces.
absZh: 我们提出了一种替代的生成对抗网络生成器架构，借鉴了风格迁移文献。新架构自动学习并实现了生成图像中高层属性（例如，在人类面部训练时的姿态和身份）与随机变化（例如，雀斑、头发）的无监督分离，并实现了直观的、尺度特定的合成控制。新生成器在传统分布质量指标上提升了最先进水平，展示了更好的插值特性，并更好地解耦了潜在因素的变化。为了量化插值质量和解耦程度，我们提出了两种新的自动化方法，适用于任何生成器架构。最后，我们引入了一个新的、高度多样化和高质量的人脸数据集。

contrib.en: Proposes a style-based generator architecture for GANs, enabling unsupervised separation of high-level attributes and stochastic variation.
contrib.zh: 提出一种基于风格的生成器架构，实现高层属性与随机变化的无监督分离。

contrib.en: Introduces an intermediate latent space that improves disentanglement and linearity of factors of variation.
contrib.zh: 引入中间潜在空间，提升变化因素的解耦性和线性度。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art FID scores on CelebA-HQ and FFHQ datasets, improving by nearly 20%.
contrib.zh: 在CelebA-HQ和FFHQ数据集上达到最优FID分数，提升近20%。

contrib.en: Develops two new automated metrics—perceptual path length and linear separability—for quantifying interpolation quality and disentanglement.
contrib.zh: 开发两种新自动指标——感知路径长度和线性可分性——量化插值质量和解耦性。

contrib.en: Introduces the FFHQ dataset, a high-quality human face dataset with 70,000 images at 1024x1024 resolution.
contrib.zh: 引入FFHQ数据集，包含70,000张1024x1024分辨率的高质量人脸图像。

contrib.en: Demonstrates scale-specific control of image synthesis through style mixing and noise injection.
contrib.zh: 通过风格混合和噪声注入展示图像合成的尺度特定控制。

limits.en: The method does not modify the discriminator or loss function, limiting potential improvements from those components.
limits.zh: 该方法未修改判别器或损失函数，限制了这些组件的潜在改进。

limits.en: The proposed metrics rely on pre-trained classifiers and perceptual distances, which may introduce bias.
limits.zh: 所提指标依赖预训练分类器和感知距离，可能引入偏差。

limits.en: The truncation trick reduces variation in generated images, limiting diversity.
limits.zh: 截断技巧减少生成图像的多样性，限制了变化范围。

limits.en: The approach is evaluated only on face and scene datasets; generalization to other domains is not verified.
limits.zh: 该方法仅在人脸和场景数据集上评估，未验证对其他领域的泛化性。

limits.en: The mapping network requires careful tuning of learning rates to avoid training instability.
limits.zh: 映射网络需要仔细调整学习率以避免训练不稳定。

items.en: We propose an alternative generator architecture for generative adversarial networks, borrowing from style transfer literature. The new architecture leads to an automatically learned, unsupervised separation of high-level attributes (e.g., pose and identity when trained on human faces) and stochastic variation in the generated images (e.g., freckles, hair), and it enables intuitive, scale-specific control of the synthesis. The new generator improves the state-of-the-art in terms of traditional distribution quality metrics, leads to demonstrably better interpolation properties, and also better disentangles the latent factors of variation. To quantify interpolation quality and disentanglement, we propose two new, automated methods that are applicable to any generator architecture. Finally, we introduce a new, highly varied and high-quality dataset of human faces.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种生成对抗网络的替代生成器架构，借鉴了风格迁移文献。新架构能够自动学习、无监督地分离生成图像中的高级属性（例如，在训练人脸时，姿态和身份）与随机变化（例如，雀斑、头发），并实现了直观的、尺度特定的合成控制。新的生成器在传统分布质量指标方面提升了现有技术水平，展现出明显更好的插值特性，并且更好地解开了潜在变化因素。为了量化插值质量和解缠结程度，我们提出了两种新的自动化方法，适用于任何生成器架构。最后，我们引入了一个新的、高度多样且高质量的人脸数据集。

items.en: The resolution and quality of images produced by generative methods — especially generative adversarial networks (GAN) [22] — have seen rapid improvement recently [30, 45, 5]. Yet the generators continue to operate as black boxes, and despite recent efforts [3], the understanding of various aspects of the image synthesis process, e.g., the origin of stochastic features, is still lacking. The properties of the latent space are also poorly understood, and the commonly demonstrated latent space interpolations [13, 52, 37] provide no quantitative way to compare different generators against each other.
items.zh: 生成方法——尤其是生成对抗网络（GAN）[22]——产生的图像分辨率和质量最近得到了快速提升[30, 45, 5]。然而，生成器仍然作为黑箱运行，尽管最近有了一些努力[3]，但对图像合成过程各个方面的理解，例如随机特征的起源，仍然缺乏。潜在空间的特性也知之甚少，通常展示的潜在空间插值[13, 52, 37]没有提供定量方法来比较不同生成器。

items.en: Motivated by style transfer literature [27], we re-design the generator architecture in a way that exposes novel ways to control the image synthesis process. Our generator starts from a learned constant input and adjusts the “style” of the image at each convolution layer based on the latent code, therefore directly controlling the strength of image features at different scales. Combined with noise injected directly into the network, this architectural change leads to automatic, unsupervised separation of high-level attributes (e.g., pose, identity) from stochastic variation (e.g., freckles, hair) in the generated images, and enables intuitive scale-specific mixing and interpolation operations. We do not modify the discriminator or the loss function in any way, and our work is thus orthogonal to the ongoing discussion about GAN loss functions, regularization, and hyper-parameters [24, 45, 5, 40, 44, 36].
items.zh: 受风格迁移文献[27]的启发，我们重新设计了生成器架构，以暴露控制图像合成过程的新方法。我们的生成器从一个学习到的常数输入开始，并根据潜在代码调整每个卷积层的图像“风格”，从而直接控制不同尺度上图像特征的强度。结合直接注入网络的噪声，这种架构变化导致生成图像中高级属性（例如，姿态、身份）与随机变化（例如，雀斑、头发）的自动、无监督分离，并实现了直观的尺度特定混合和插值操作。我们没有以任何方式修改判别器或损失函数，因此我们的工作与当前关于GAN损失函数、正则化和超参数的讨论是正交的[24, 45, 5, 40, 44, 36]。

items.en: Our generator embeds the input latent code into an intermediate latent space, which has a profound effect on how the factors of variation are represented in the network. The input latent space must follow the probability density of the training data, and we argue that this leads to some degree of unavoidable entanglement. Our intermediate latent space is free from that restriction and is therefore allowed to be disentangled. As previous methods for estimating the degree of latent space disentanglement are not directly applicable in our case, we propose two new automated metrics — perceptual path length and linear separability — for quantifying these aspects of the generator. Using these metrics, we show that compared to a traditional generator architecture, our generator admits a more linear, less entangled representation of different factors of variation.
items.zh: 我们的生成器将输入潜在代码嵌入到一个中间潜在空间中，这对网络中变化因素的表示方式产生了深远影响。输入潜在空间必须遵循训练数据的概率密度，我们认为这会导致一定程度的不可避免的纠缠。我们的中间潜在空间不受此限制，因此可以解缠结。由于先前估计潜在空间解缠结程度的方法不直接适用于我们的情况，我们提出了两种新的自动化指标——感知路径长度和线性可分离性——用于量化生成器的这些方面。使用这些指标，我们表明，与传统生成器架构相比，我们的生成器允许对不同变化因素进行更线性、更少纠缠的表示。

items.en: Finally, we present a new dataset of human faces (Flickr-Faces-HQ, FFHQ) that offers much higher quality and covers considerably wider variation than existing high-resolution datasets (Appendix A). We have made this dataset publicly available, along with our source code and pre-trained networks.111https://github.com/NVlabs/stylegan The accompanying video can be found under the same link.
items.zh: 最后，我们提出了一个新的人脸数据集（Flickr-Faces-HQ, FFHQ），其质量远高于现有高分辨率数据集，并且涵盖了更广泛的变化（附录A）。我们已经公开了这个数据集，以及我们的源代码和预训练网络。111https://github.com/NVlabs/stylegan 相关视频可在同一链接下找到。

items.capEn: Figure 1: While a traditional generator [30] feeds the latent code though the input layer only, we first map the input to an intermediate latent space 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W}, which then controls the generator through adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) at each convolution layer. Gaussian noise is added after each convolution, before evaluating the nonlinearity. Here “A” stands for a learned affine transform, and “B” applies learned per-channel scaling factors to the noise input. The mapping network f𝑓f consists of 8 layers and the synthesis network g𝑔g consists of 18 layers — two for each resolution (42−10242superscript42superscript102424^{2}-1024^{2}). The output of the last layer is converted to RGB using a separate 1×1111\times 1 convolution, similar to Karras et al. [30]. Our generator has a total of 26.2M trainable parameters, compared to 23.1M in the traditional generator.
items.capZh: 图1：传统生成器[30]仅通过输入层馈送潜在代码，而我们首先将输入映射到中间潜在空间𝒲，然后通过自适应实例归一化（AdaIN）在每个卷积层控制生成器。高斯噪声在每个卷积之后、非线性评估之前添加。这里“A”表示学习到的仿射变换，“B”将学习到的每通道缩放因子应用于噪声输入。映射网络f由8层组成，合成网络g由18层组成——每个分辨率两个（42−1024²）。最后一层的输出使用单独的1×1卷积转换为RGB，类似于Karras等人[30]。我们的生成器共有26.2M可训练参数，而传统生成器为23.1M。

items.en: Traditionally the latent code is provided to the generator through an input layer, i.e., the first layer of a feedforward network (Figure 1a). We depart from this design by omitting the input layer altogether and starting from a learned constant instead (Figure 1b, right). Given a latent code 𝐳𝐳{\bf z} in the input latent space 𝒵𝒵\mathcal{Z}, a non-linear mapping network f:𝒵→𝒲:𝑓→𝒵𝒲f:\mathcal{Z}\to\mathcal{W} first produces 𝐰∈𝒲𝐰𝒲{\bf w}\in\mathcal{W} (Figure 1b, left). For simplicity, we set the dimensionality of both spaces to 512, and the mapping f𝑓f is implemented using an 8-layer MLP, a decision we will analyze in Section 4.1. Learned affine transformations then specialize 𝐰𝐰{\bf w} to styles 𝐲=(𝐲s,𝐲b)𝐲subscript𝐲𝑠subscript𝐲𝑏{\bf y}=({\bf y}_{s},{\bf y}_{b}) that control adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) [27, 17, 21, 16] operations after each convolution layer of the synthesis network g𝑔g. The AdaIN operation is defined as
items.zh: 传统上，潜在代码通过输入层提供给生成器，即前馈网络的第一层（图1a）。我们通过完全省略输入层并从学习到的常数开始（图1b，右侧）来偏离这种设计。给定输入潜在空间𝒵中的潜在代码𝐳，非线性映射网络f: 𝒵→𝒲首先产生𝐰∈𝒲（图1b，左侧）。为简单起见，我们将两个空间的维度都设置为512，映射f使用8层MLP实现，我们将在第4.1节分析这一决定。然后，学习到的仿射变换将𝐰专门化为风格𝐲=(𝐲s, 𝐲b)，这些风格控制合成网络g每个卷积层之后的自适应实例归一化（AdaIN）[27, 17, 21, 16]操作。AdaIN操作定义为

items.tex: \textrm{AdaIN}({\bf x}_{i},{\bf y})={\bf y}_{s,i}\frac{{\bf x}_{i}-\mu({\bf x}_{i})}{\sigma({\bf x}_{i})}+{\bf y}_{b,i}\textrm{,}

items.en: where each feature map 𝐱isubscript𝐱𝑖{\bf x}_{i} is normalized separately, and then scaled and biased using the corresponding scalar components from style 𝐲𝐲{\bf y}. Thus the dimensionality of 𝐲𝐲{\bf y} is twice the number of feature maps on that layer.
items.zh: 其中每个特征图𝐱_i被单独归一化，然后使用风格𝐲中的相应标量分量进行缩放和偏置。因此，𝐲的维度是该层特征图数量的两倍。

items.en: Comparing our approach to style transfer, we compute the spatially invariant style 𝐲𝐲{\bf y} from vector 𝐰𝐰{\bf w} instead of an example image. We choose to reuse the word “style” for 𝐲𝐲{\bf y} because similar network architectures are already used for feedforward style transfer [27], unsupervised image-to-image translation [28], and domain mixtures [23]. Compared to more general feature transforms [38, 57], AdaIN is particularly well suited for our purposes due to its efficiency and compact representation.
items.zh: 将我们的方法与风格迁移进行比较，我们从向量𝐰而不是示例图像计算空间不变的风格𝐲。我们选择为𝐲重用“风格”一词，因为类似的网络架构已用于前馈风格迁移[27]、无监督图像到图像翻译[28]和域混合[23]。与更一般的特征变换[38, 57]相比，AdaIN由于其效率和紧凑表示而特别适合我们的目的。

items.en: Finally, we provide our generator with a direct means to generate stochastic detail by introducing explicit noise inputs. These are single-channel images consisting of uncorrelated Gaussian noise, and we feed a dedicated noise image to each layer of the synthesis network. The noise image is broadcasted to all feature maps using learned per-feature scaling factors and then added to the output of the corresponding convolution, as illustrated in Figure 1b. The implications of adding the noise inputs are discussed in Sections 3.2 and 3.3.
items.zh: 最后，我们通过引入显式噪声输入为生成器提供生成随机细节的直接手段。这些噪声输入是由不相关高斯噪声组成的单通道图像，我们向合成网络的每一层馈送专用的噪声图像。噪声图像使用学习到的每特征缩放因子广播到所有特征图，然后添加到相应卷积的输出中，如图1b所示。添加噪声输入的含义在第3.2和3.3节中讨论。

items.en: Before studying the properties of our generator, we demonstrate experimentally that the redesign does not compromise image quality but, in fact, improves it considerably. Table 1 gives Fréchet inception distances (FID) [25] for various generator architectures in CelebA-HQ [30] and our new FFHQ dataset (Appendix A). Results for other datasets are given in Appendix E. Our baseline configuration (a) is the Progressive GAN setup of Karras et al. [30], from which we inherit the networks and all hyperparameters except where stated otherwise. We first switch to an improved baseline (b) by using bilinear up/downsampling operations [64], longer training, and tuned hyperparameters. A detailed description of training setups and hyperparameters is included in Appendix C. We then improve this new baseline further by adding the mapping network and AdaIN operations (c), and make a surprising observation that the network no longer benefits from feeding the latent code into the first convolution layer. We therefore simplify the architecture by removing the traditional input layer and starting the image synthesis from a learned 4×4×512445124\times 4\times 512 constant tensor (d). We find it quite remarkable that the synthesis network is able to produce meaningful results even though it receives input only through the styles that control the AdaIN operations.
items.zh: 在研究生成器的特性之前，我们通过实验证明重新设计不会损害图像质量，反而会显著提高图像质量。表1给出了CelebA-HQ [30]和我们新的FFHQ数据集（附录A）中各种生成器架构的Fréchet初始距离（FID）[25]。其他数据集的结果见附录E。我们的基线配置（a）是Karras等人[30]的渐进式GAN设置，我们继承了网络和所有超参数，除非另有说明。我们首先通过使用双线性上/下采样操作[64]、更长的训练和调整的超参数切换到改进的基线（b）。训练设置和超参数的详细描述包含在附录C中。然后，我们通过添加映射网络和AdaIN操作（c）进一步改进这个新基线，并惊讶地发现网络不再受益于将潜在代码馈送到第一个卷积层。因此，我们通过移除传统输入层并从学习到的4×4×512常数张量（d）开始图像合成来简化架构。我们发现合成网络能够产生有意义的结果，即使它只通过控制AdaIN操作的风格接收输入，这一点非常值得注意。

items.en: Finally, we introduce the noise inputs (e) that improve the results further, as well as novel mixing regularization (f) that decorrelates neighboring styles and enables more fine-grained control over the generated imagery (Section 3.1).
items.zh: 最后，我们引入噪声输入（e），进一步改善了结果，以及新颖的混合正则化（f），它解除了相邻风格的相关性，并实现了对生成图像更精细的控制（第3.1节）。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Uncurated set of images produced by our style-based generator (config f) with the FFHQ dataset. Here we used a variation of the truncation trick [42, 5, 34] with ψ=0.7𝜓0.7\psi=0.7 for resolutions 42−322superscript42superscript3224^{2}-32^{2}. Please see the accompanying video for more results.
items.capZh: 图2：使用我们的风格生成器（配置f）在FFHQ数据集上生成的一组未经筛选的图像。这里我们对分辨率42−32²使用了截断技巧[42, 5, 34]的变体，ψ=0.7。更多结果请参见随附视频。

items.en: We evaluate our methods using two different loss functions: for CelebA-HQ we rely on WGAN-GP [24], while FFHQ uses WGAN-GP for configuration a and non-saturating loss [22] with R1subscript𝑅1R_{1} regularization [44, 51, 14] for configurations b–f. We found these choices to give the best results. Our contributions do not modify the loss function.
items.zh: 我们使用两种不同的损失函数评估我们的方法：对于CelebA-HQ，我们依赖WGAN-GP [24]，而FFHQ在配置a中使用WGAN-GP，在配置b–f中使用带有R1正则化[44, 51, 14]的非饱和损失[22]。我们发现这些选择给出了最佳结果。我们的贡献没有修改损失函数。

items.en: We observe that the style-based generator (e) improves FIDs quite significantly over the traditional generator (b), almost 20%, corroborating the large-scale ImageNet measurements made in parallel work [6, 5]. Figure 2 shows an uncurated set of novel images generated from the FFHQ dataset using our generator. As confirmed by the FIDs, the average quality is high, and even accessories such as eyeglasses and hats get successfully synthesized. For this figure, we avoided sampling from the extreme regions of 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} using the so-called truncation trick [42, 5, 34] — Appendix B details how the trick can be performed in 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} instead of 𝒵𝒵\mathcal{Z}. Note that our generator allows applying the truncation selectively to low resolutions only, so that high-resolution details are not affected.
items.zh: 我们观察到，风格生成器（e）比传统生成器（b）显著改善了FID，几乎提高了20%，这与并行工作中大规模ImageNet的测量结果一致[6, 5]。图2显示了使用我们的生成器从FFHQ数据集生成的一组未经筛选的新图像。正如FID所证实的，平均质量很高，甚至眼镜和帽子等配饰也成功合成。对于此图，我们使用所谓的截断技巧[42, 5, 34]避免了从𝒲的极端区域采样——附录B详细说明了如何在𝒲而不是𝒵中执行该技巧。请注意，我们的生成器允许选择性地仅对低分辨率应用截断，因此高分辨率细节不受影响。

items.en: All FIDs in this paper are computed without the truncation trick, and we only use it for illustrative purposes in Figure 2 and the video. All images are generated in 10242superscript102421024^{2} resolution.
items.zh: 本文中的所有FID都是在不使用截断技巧的情况下计算的，我们仅在图2和视频中将其用于说明目的。所有图像均以1024²分辨率生成。

items.en: Much of the work on GAN architectures has focused on improving the discriminator by, e.g., using multiple discriminators [18, 47, 11], multiresolution discrimination [60, 55], or self-attention [63]. The work on generator side has mostly focused on the exact distribution in the input latent space [5] or shaping the input latent space via Gaussian mixture models [4], clustering [48], or encouraging convexity [52].
items.zh: 关于GAN架构的许多工作都集中在改进判别器上，例如，使用多个判别器[18, 47, 11]、多分辨率判别[60, 55]或自注意力[63]。生成器方面的工作主要集中在输入潜在空间中的精确分布[5]或通过高斯混合模型[4]、聚类[48]或鼓励凸性[52]来塑造输入潜在空间。

items.en: Recent conditional generators feed the class identifier through a separate embedding network to a large number of layers in the generator [46], while the latent is still provided though the input layer. A few authors have considered feeding parts of the latent code to multiple generator layers [9, 5]. In parallel work, Chen et al. [6] “self modulate” the generator using AdaINs, similarly to our work, but do not consider an intermediate latent space or noise inputs.
items.zh: 最近的条件生成器通过单独的嵌入网络将类别标识符馈送到生成器中的大量层[46]，而潜在代码仍然通过输入层提供。一些作者考虑了将部分潜在代码馈送到多个生成器层[9, 5]。在并行工作中，Chen等人[6]使用AdaIN对生成器进行“自调制”，类似于我们的工作，但没有考虑中间潜在空间或噪声输入。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Two sets of images were generated from their respective latent codes (sources A and B); the rest of the images were generated by copying a specified subset of styles from source B and taking the rest from source A. Copying the styles corresponding to coarse spatial resolutions (42superscript424^{2} – 82superscript828^{2}) brings high-level aspects such as pose, general hair style, face shape, and eyeglasses from source B, while all colors (eyes, hair, lighting) and finer facial features resemble A. If we instead copy the styles of middle resolutions (162superscript16216^{2} – 322superscript32232^{2}) from B, we inherit smaller scale facial features, hair style, eyes open/closed from B, while the pose, general face shape, and eyeglasses from A are preserved. Finally, copying the fine styles (642superscript64264^{2} – 10242superscript102421024^{2}) from B brings mainly the color scheme and microstructure.
items.capZh: 图3：两组图像分别从各自的潜在代码（源A和B）生成；其余图像通过从源B复制指定子集的风格并从源A获取其余风格生成。复制对应于粗空间分辨率（4² – 8²）的风格会从源B带来高级方面，如姿态、一般发型、脸型和眼镜，而所有颜色（眼睛、头发、光照）和更精细的面部特征类似于A。如果我们改为从B复制中间分辨率（16² – 32²）的风格，我们会从B继承较小尺度的面部特征、发型、眼睛睁开/闭合，而来自A的姿态、一般脸型和眼镜得以保留。最后，从B复制精细风格（64² – 1024²）主要带来配色方案和微结构。

full.secZh: 3 基于样式的生成器的特性

items.en: Our generator architecture makes it possible to control the image synthesis via scale-specific modifications to the styles. We can view the mapping network and affine transformations as a way to draw samples for each style from a learned distribution, and the synthesis network as a way to generate a novel image based on a collection of styles. The effects of each style are localized in the network, i.e., modifying a specific subset of the styles can be expected to affect only certain aspects of the image.
items.zh: 我们的生成器架构使得通过尺度特定的风格修改来控制图像合成成为可能。我们可以将映射网络和仿射变换视为从学习到的分布中为每种风格抽取样本的方式，而合成网络则是基于一组风格生成新图像的方式。每种风格的效果在网络中是局部化的，即修改特定的风格子集可以预期只影响图像的某些方面。

items.en: To see the reason for this localization, let us consider how the AdaIN operation (Eq. 1) first normalizes each channel to zero mean and unit variance, and only then applies scales and biases based on the style. The new per-channel statistics, as dictated by the style, modify the relative importance of features for the subsequent convolution operation, but they do not depend on the original statistics because of the normalization. Thus each style controls only one convolution before being overridden by the next AdaIN operation.
items.zh: 为了理解这种局部化的原因，我们考虑AdaIN操作（公式1）首先将每个通道归一化为零均值和单位方差，然后仅根据风格应用缩放和偏置。由风格决定的新的逐通道统计量修改了特征对于后续卷积操作的相对重要性，但由于归一化，它们不依赖于原始统计量。因此，每个风格在下一个AdaIN操作覆盖之前仅控制一个卷积。

items.en: To further encourage the styles to localize, we employ mixing regularization, where a given percentage of images are generated using two random latent codes instead of one during training. When generating such an image, we simply switch from one latent code to another — an operation we refer to as style mixing — at a randomly selected point in the synthesis network. To be specific, we run two latent codes 𝐳1,𝐳2subscript𝐳1subscript𝐳2{\bf z}_{1},{\bf z}_{2} through the mapping network, and have the corresponding 𝐰1,𝐰2subscript𝐰1subscript𝐰2{\bf w}_{1},{\bf w}_{2} control the styles so that 𝐰1subscript𝐰1{\bf w}_{1} applies before the crossover point and 𝐰2subscript𝐰2{\bf w}_{2} after it. This regularization technique prevents the network from assuming that adjacent styles are correlated.
items.zh: 为了进一步鼓励风格局部化，我们采用了混合正则化，即在训练过程中，给定百分比的图像使用两个随机潜码而非一个生成。生成此类图像时，我们在合成网络中的随机选择点从一个潜码切换到另一个——我们称之为风格混合的操作。具体来说，我们将两个潜码𝐳₁,𝐳₂通过映射网络，并让对应的𝐰₁,𝐰₂控制风格，使得𝐰₁在交叉点之前应用，𝐰₂在之后应用。这种正则化技术防止网络假设相邻风格是相关的。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Examples of stochastic variation. (a) Two generated images. (b) Zoom-in with different realizations of input noise. While the overall appearance is almost identical, individual hairs are placed very differently. (c) Standard deviation of each pixel over 100 different realizations, highlighting which parts of the images are affected by the noise. The main areas are the hair, silhouettes, and parts of background, but there is also interesting stochastic variation in the eye reflections. Global aspects such as identity and pose are unaffected by stochastic variation.
items.capZh: 图4：随机变化的示例。(a) 两张生成的图像。(b) 使用不同输入噪声实现的放大图。虽然整体外观几乎相同，但个别头发的放置非常不同。(c) 每个像素在100种不同实现上的标准差，突出显示图像的哪些部分受噪声影响。主要区域是头发、轮廓和部分背景，但眼睛反射中也有有趣的随机变化。全局方面如身份和姿势不受随机变化的影响。

items.en: There are many aspects in human portraits that can be regarded as stochastic, such as the exact placement of hairs, stubble, freckles, or skin pores. Any of these can be randomized without affecting our perception of the image as long as they follow the correct distribution.
items.zh: 人像中有许多方面可以被视为随机的，例如头发、胡茬、雀斑或皮肤毛孔的精确位置。只要遵循正确的分布，这些都可以随机化而不影响我们对图像的感知。

items.en: Let us consider how a traditional generator implements stochastic variation. Given that the only input to the network is through the input layer, the network needs to invent a way to generate spatially-varying pseudorandom numbers from earlier activations whenever they are needed. This consumes network capacity and hiding the periodicity of generated signal is difficult — and not always successful, as evidenced by commonly seen repetitive patterns in generated images. Our architecture sidesteps these issues altogether by adding per-pixel noise after each convolution.
items.zh: 让我们考虑传统生成器如何实现随机变化。鉴于网络的唯一输入是通过输入层，网络需要发明一种方法，在需要时从早期激活生成空间变化的伪随机数。这会消耗网络容量，并且隐藏生成信号的周期性很困难——而且并不总是成功，正如生成图像中常见的重复模式所证明的那样。我们的架构通过在每次卷积后添加逐像素噪声完全避免了这些问题。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Effect of noise inputs at different layers of our generator. (a) Noise is applied to all layers. (b) No noise. (c) Noise in fine layers only (642superscript64264^{2} – 10242superscript102421024^{2}). (d) Noise in coarse layers only (42superscript424^{2} – 322superscript32232^{2}). We can see that the artificial omission of noise leads to featureless “painterly” look. Coarse noise causes large-scale curling of hair and appearance of larger background features, while the fine noise brings out the finer curls of hair, finer background detail, and skin pores.
items.capZh: 图5：噪声输入在我们生成器不同层的影响。(a) 噪声应用于所有层。(b) 无噪声。(c) 仅精细层（64² – 1024²）中的噪声。(d) 仅粗糙层（4² – 32²）中的噪声。我们可以看到，人为省略噪声会导致无特征的“绘画式”外观。粗糙噪声引起头发的大尺度卷曲和较大背景特征的出现，而精细噪声则带出更精细的头发卷曲、更精细的背景细节和皮肤毛孔。

items.en: We find it interesting that the effect of noise appears tightly localized in the network. We hypothesize that at any point in the generator, there is pressure to introduce new content as soon as possible, and the easiest way for our network to create stochastic variation is to rely on the noise provided. A fresh set of noise is available for every layer, and thus there is no incentive to generate the stochastic effects from earlier activations, leading to a localized effect.
items.zh: 我们发现有趣的是，噪声的影响在网络中似乎高度局部化。我们假设，在生成器的任何点，都存在尽快引入新内容的压力，而我们的网络创建随机变化的最简单方式是依赖提供的噪声。每一层都有新的噪声集可用，因此没有动机从早期激活生成随机效果，从而导致局部化效果。

full.sec: 3.3 Separation of global effects from stochasticity
full.secZh: 3.3 全局效果与随机性的分离

items.en: The previous sections as well as the accompanying video demonstrate that while changes to the style have global effects (changing pose, identity, etc.), the noise affects only inconsequential stochastic variation (differently combed hair, beard, etc.). This observation is in line with style transfer literature, where it has been established that spatially invariant statistics (Gram matrix, channel-wise mean, variance, etc.) reliably encode the style of an image [20, 39] while spatially varying features encode a specific instance.
items.zh: 前面的部分以及随附的视频表明，虽然对风格的改变具有全局效果（改变姿势、身份等），但噪声仅影响无关紧要的随机变化（不同梳理的头发、胡须等）。这一观察与风格迁移文献一致，其中已确定空间不变统计量（Gram矩阵、通道均值、方差等）可靠地编码图像的风格[20, 39]，而空间变化特征编码特定实例。

items.en: In our style-based generator, the style affects the entire image because complete feature maps are scaled and biased with the same values. Therefore, global effects such as pose, lighting, or background style can be controlled coherently. Meanwhile, the noise is added independently to each pixel and is thus ideally suited for controlling stochastic variation. If the network tried to control, e.g., pose using the noise, that would lead to spatially inconsistent decisions that would then be penalized by the discriminator. Thus the network learns to use the global and local channels appropriately, without explicit guidance.
items.zh: 在我们的基于风格的生成器中，风格影响整个图像，因为完整的特征图使用相同的值进行缩放和偏置。因此，全局效果如姿势、光照或背景风格可以连贯地控制。同时，噪声独立地添加到每个像素，因此非常适合控制随机变化。如果网络试图使用噪声控制姿势，那将导致空间不一致的决策，然后被判别器惩罚。因此，网络学会适当地使用全局和局部通道，无需明确指导。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Illustrative example with two factors of variation (image features, e.g., masculinity and hair length). (a) An example training set where some combination (e.g., long haired males) is missing. (b) This forces the mapping from 𝒵𝒵\mathcal{Z} to image features to become curved so that the forbidden combination disappears in 𝒵𝒵\mathcal{Z} to prevent the sampling of invalid combinations. (c) The learned mapping from 𝒵𝒵\mathcal{Z} to 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} is able to “undo” much of the warping.
items.capZh: 图6：具有两个变化因子（图像特征，例如男性气质和头发长度）的说明性示例。(a) 一个示例训练集，其中某些组合（例如长发男性）缺失。(b) 这迫使从𝒵到图像特征的映射变得弯曲，使得禁止的组合在𝒵中消失，以防止采样无效组合。(c) 从𝒵到𝒲的学习映射能够“撤销”大部分扭曲。

items.en: There are various definitions for disentanglement [54, 50, 2, 7, 19], but a common goal is a latent space that consists of linear subspaces, each of which controls one factor of variation. However, the sampling probability of each combination of factors in 𝒵𝒵\mathcal{Z} needs to match the corresponding density in the training data. As illustrated in Figure 6, this precludes the factors from being fully disentangled with typical datasets and input latent distributions.222The few artificial datasets designed for disentanglement studies (e.g., [43, 19]) tabulate all combinations of predetermined factors of variation with uniform frequency, thus hiding the problem.
items.zh: 解缠结有多种定义[54, 50, 2, 7, 19]，但一个共同目标是潜空间由线性子空间组成，每个子空间控制一个变化因子。然而，𝒵中每个因子组合的采样概率需要与训练数据中的相应密度匹配。如图6所示，这阻止了因子在典型数据集和输入潜分布下完全解缠结。²²为解缠结研究设计的少数人工数据集（例如[43, 19]）以均匀频率列出所有预定义变化因子的组合，从而隐藏了问题。

items.en: A major benefit of our generator architecture is that the intermediate latent space 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} does not have to support sampling according to any fixed distribution; its sampling density is induced by the learned piecewise continuous mapping f​(𝐳)𝑓𝐳f({\bf z}). This mapping can be adapted to “unwarp” 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} so that the factors of variation become more linear. We posit that there is pressure for the generator to do so, as it should be easier to generate realistic images based on a disentangled representation than based on an entangled representation. As such, we expect the training to yield a less entangled 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} in an unsupervised setting, i.e., when the factors of variation are not known in advance [10, 35, 49, 8, 26, 32, 7].
items.zh: 我们生成器架构的一个主要好处是中间潜空间𝒲不必支持根据任何固定分布采样；其采样密度由学习到的分段连续映射f(𝐳)诱导。这个映射可以适应“解扭曲”𝒲，使得变化因子变得更加线性。我们假设生成器有压力这样做，因为基于解缠结表示生成真实图像应该比基于缠结表示更容易。因此，我们期望训练在无监督设置下产生更少缠结的𝒲，即当变化因子事先未知时[10, 35, 49, 8, 26, 32, 7]。

items.en: Unfortunately the metrics recently proposed for quantifying disentanglement [26, 32, 7, 19] require an encoder network that maps input images to latent codes. These metrics are ill-suited for our purposes since our baseline GAN lacks such an encoder. While it is possible to add an extra network for this purpose [8, 12, 15], we want to avoid investing effort into a component that is not a part of the actual solution. To this end, we describe two new ways of quantifying disentanglement, neither of which requires an encoder or known factors of variation, and are therefore computable for any image dataset and generator.
items.zh: 不幸的是，最近提出的用于量化解缠结的度量[26, 32, 7, 19]需要将输入图像映射到潜码的编码器网络。这些度量不适合我们的目的，因为我们的基线GAN缺乏这样的编码器。虽然可以为此添加额外的网络[8, 12, 15]，但我们希望避免将精力投入到不是实际解决方案一部分的组件上。为此，我们描述了两种量化解缠结的新方法，这两种方法都不需要编码器或已知的变化因子，因此对于任何图像数据集和生成器都是可计算的。

items.en: As noted by Laine [37], interpolation of latent-space vectors may yield surprisingly non-linear changes in the image. For example, features that are absent in either endpoint may appear in the middle of a linear interpolation path. This is a sign that the latent space is entangled and the factors of variation are not properly separated. To quantify this effect, we can measure how drastic changes the image undergoes as we perform interpolation in the latent space. Intuitively, a less curved latent space should result in perceptually smoother transition than a highly curved latent space.
items.zh: 正如Laine [37]所指出的，潜空间向量的插值可能在图像中产生令人惊讶的非线性变化。例如，在端点中不存在的特征可能出现在线性插值路径的中间。这是潜空间缠结且变化因子未适当分离的标志。为了量化这种效果，我们可以测量在潜空间中执行插值时图像经历的剧烈变化。直观上，弯曲较少的潜空间应该比高度弯曲的潜空间产生感知上更平滑的过渡。

items.en: As a basis for our metric, we use a perceptually-based pairwise image distance [65] that is calculated as a weighted difference between two VGG16 [58] embeddings, where the weights are fit so that the metric agrees with human perceptual similarity judgments. If we subdivide a latent space interpolation path into linear segments, we can define the total perceptual length of this segmented path as the sum of perceptual differences over each segment, as reported by the image distance metric. A natural definition for the perceptual path length would be the limit of this sum under infinitely fine subdivision, but in practice we approximate it using a small subdivision epsilon ϵ=10−4italic-ϵsuperscript104\epsilon=10^{-4}. The average perceptual path length in latent space 𝒵𝒵\mathcal{Z}, over all possible endpoints, is therefore
items.zh: 作为我们度量的基础，我们使用基于感知的成对图像距离[65]，该距离计算为两个VGG16 [58]嵌入之间的加权差，其中权重被拟合使得度量与人类感知相似性判断一致。如果我们将潜空间插值路径细分为线性段，我们可以将此分段路径的总感知长度定义为每个段上感知差异的总和，由图像距离度量报告。感知路径长度的自然定义将是无限细分下此和的极限，但在实践中我们使用小的细分epsilon ε=10⁻⁴来近似。潜空间𝒵中的平均感知路径长度，在所有可能的端点上，因此为

Here slerpslerp\mathrm{slerp} denotes spherical interpolation [56], which is the most appropriate way of interpolating in our normalized input latent space [61]. To concentrate on the facial features instead of background, we crop the generated images to contain only the face prior to evaluating the pairwise image metric. As the metric d𝑑d is quadratic [65], we divide by ϵ2superscriptitalic-ϵ2\epsilon^{2}. We compute the expectation by taking 100,000 samples.

items.capEn: Figure 7: The FFHQ dataset offers a lot of variety in terms of age, ethnicity, viewpoint, lighting, and image background.
items.capZh: 图7：FFHQ数据集在年龄、种族、视角、光照和图像背景方面提供了丰富的多样性。

items.en: where the only difference is that interpolation happens in 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} space. Because vectors in 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} are not normalized in any fashion, we use linear interpolation (lerplerp\mathrm{lerp}).
items.zh: 其中唯一的区别是插值发生在𝒲空间中。由于𝒲中的向量没有以任何方式归一化，我们使用线性插值（lerp）。

items.en: If a latent space is sufficiently disentangled, it should be possible to find direction vectors that consistently correspond to individual factors of variation. We propose another metric that quantifies this effect by measuring how well the latent-space points can be separated into two distinct sets via a linear hyperplane, so that each set corresponds to a specific binary attribute of the image.
items.zh: 如果潜空间足够解缠结，应该可以找到一致对应于各个变化因子的方向向量。我们提出另一个度量，通过测量潜空间点可以通过线性超平面分离成两个不同的集合的程度来量化这种效果，使得每个集合对应于图像的特定二元属性。

items.en: In order to label the generated images, we train auxiliary classification networks for a number of binary attributes, e.g., to distinguish male and female faces. In our tests, the classifiers had the same architecture as the discriminator we use (i.e., same as in [30]), and were trained using the CelebA-HQ dataset that retains the 40 attributes available in the original CelebA dataset. To measure the separability of one attribute, we generate 200,000 images with 𝐳∼P​(𝐳)similar-to𝐳𝑃𝐳{\bf z}\sim P({\bf z}) and classify them using the auxiliary classification network. We then sort the samples according to classifier confidence and remove the least confident half, yielding 100,000 labeled latent-space vectors.
items.zh: 为了对生成的图像进行标注，我们针对多个二元属性训练了辅助分类网络，例如区分男性和女性面孔。在我们的测试中，分类器采用了与判别器相同的架构（即与[30]相同），并使用CelebA-HQ数据集进行训练，该数据集保留了原始CelebA数据集中的40个属性。为了衡量一个属性的可分离性，我们生成200,000张图像，其中𝐳∼P(𝐳)，并使用辅助分类网络对其进行分类。然后根据分类器的置信度对样本进行排序，并移除置信度最低的一半，得到100,000个带标签的潜空间向量。

items.en: For each attribute, we fit a linear SVM to predict the label based on the latent-space point — 𝐳𝐳{\bf z} for traditional and 𝐰𝐰{\bf w} for style-based — and classify the points by this plane. We then compute the conditional entropy H​(Y|X)Hconditional𝑌𝑋{\mathrm{H}}(Y|X) where X𝑋X are the classes predicted by the SVM and Y𝑌Y are the classes determined by the pre-trained classifier. This tells how much additional information is required to determine the true class of a sample, given that we know on which side of the hyperplane it lies. A low value suggests consistent latent space directions for the corresponding factor(s) of variation.
items.zh: 对于每个属性，我们拟合一个线性SVM，根据潜空间点（传统方法为𝐳，基于风格的方法为𝐰）预测标签，并通过该平面对点进行分类。然后计算条件熵H(Y|X)，其中X是SVM预测的类别，Y是由预训练分类器确定的类别。这告诉我们，在已知样本位于超平面哪一侧的情况下，确定其真实类别还需要多少额外信息。低值表明相应的变化因素在潜空间中具有一致的方向。

items.en: We calculate the final separability score as exp⁡(∑iH​(Yi|Xi))subscript𝑖Hconditionalsubscript𝑌𝑖subscript𝑋𝑖\exp(\sum_{i}{\mathrm{H}}(Y_{i}|X_{i})), where i𝑖i enumerates the 40 attributes. Similar to the inception score [53], the exponentiation brings the values from logarithmic to linear domain so that they are easier to compare.
items.zh: 我们计算最终的可分离性得分为exp(∑i H(Yi|Xi))，其中i枚举40个属性。与Inception分数[53]类似，指数运算将对数值转换为线性域，以便于比较。

items.en: Based on both our results and parallel work by Chen et al. [6], it is becoming clear that the traditional GAN generator architecture is in every way inferior to a style-based design. This is true in terms of established quality metrics, and we further believe that our investigations to the separation of high-level attributes and stochastic effects, as well as the linearity of the intermediate latent space will prove fruitful in improving the understanding and controllability of GAN synthesis.
items.zh: 基于我们的结果以及Chen等人[6]的并行工作，越来越清楚的是，传统的GAN生成器架构在各个方面都逊色于基于风格的设计。这在既定的质量指标上是成立的，我们进一步相信，我们对高级属性和随机效应分离以及中间潜空间线性度的研究，将有助于提高对GAN合成的理解和可控性。

items.en: We note that our average path length metric could easily be used as a regularizer during training, and perhaps some variant of the linear separability metric could act as one, too. In general, we expect that methods for directly shaping the intermediate latent space during training will provide interesting avenues for future work.
items.zh: 我们注意到，我们的平均路径长度指标可以很容易地在训练过程中用作正则化项，也许线性可分离性指标的某种变体也可以。总的来说，我们期望在训练过程中直接塑造中间潜空间的方法将为未来的工作提供有趣的途径。

items.en: We thank Jaakko Lehtinen, David Luebke, and Tuomas Kynkäänniemi for in-depth discussions and helpful comments; Janne Hellsten, Tero Kuosmanen, and Pekka Jänis for compute infrastructure and help with the code release.
items.zh: 我们感谢Jaakko Lehtinen、David Luebke和Tuomas Kynkäänniemi的深入讨论和有益评论；感谢Janne Hellsten、Tero Kuosmanen和Pekka Jänis提供计算基础设施并帮助代码发布。

items.en: We have collected a new dataset of human faces, Flickr-Faces-HQ (FFHQ), consisting of 70,000 high-quality images at 10242superscript102421024^{2} resolution (Figure 7). The dataset includes vastly more variation than CelebA-HQ [30] in terms of age, ethnicity and image background, and also has much better coverage of accessories such as eyeglasses, sunglasses, hats, etc. The images were crawled from Flickr (thus inheriting all the biases of that website) and automatically aligned [31] and cropped. Only images under permissive licenses were collected. Various automatic filters were used to prune the set, and finally Mechanical Turk allowed us to remove the occasional statues, paintings, or photos of photos. We have made the dataset publicly available at https://github.com/NVlabs/ffhq-dataset
items.zh: 我们收集了一个新的人脸数据集Flickr-Faces-HQ (FFHQ)，包含70,000张1024^2分辨率的高质量图像（图7）。该数据集在年龄、种族和图像背景方面比CelebA-HQ[30]具有更大的多样性，并且对眼镜、太阳镜、帽子等配饰的覆盖也更好。图像从Flickr爬取（因此继承了该网站的所有偏见），并自动对齐[31]和裁剪。仅收集了具有宽松许可的图像。使用各种自动过滤器对集合进行修剪，最后通过Mechanical Turk移除了偶尔出现的雕像、绘画或照片中的照片。我们已在https://github.com/NVlabs/ffhq-dataset公开提供该数据集。

full.sec: Appendix B Truncation trick in 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W}
full.secZh: 附录B 𝒲中的截断技巧

items.en: If we consider the distribution of training data, it is clear that areas of low density are poorly represented and thus likely to be difficult for the generator to learn. This is a significant open problem in all generative modeling techniques. However, it is known that drawing latent vectors from a truncated [42, 5] or otherwise shrunk [34] sampling space tends to improve average image quality, although some amount of variation is lost.
items.zh: 如果我们考虑训练数据的分布，很明显低密度区域代表性不足，因此生成器可能难以学习。这是所有生成建模技术中的一个重要开放问题。然而，已知从截断[42,5]或缩小[34]的采样空间中提取潜向量往往会提高平均图像质量，尽管会损失一些变化。

items.en: We can follow a similar strategy. To begin, we compute the center of mass of 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} as 𝐰¯=𝔼𝐳∼P​(𝐳)⁡[f​(𝐳)]¯𝐰subscript𝔼similar-to𝐳𝑃𝐳𝑓𝐳{\bf\bar{w}}=\operatorname{\mathbb{E}}_{{\bf z}\sim P({\bf z})}[f({\bf z})]. In case of FFHQ this point represents a sort of an average face (Figure 8, ψ=0𝜓0\psi=0). We can then scale the deviation of a given 𝐰𝐰{\bf w} from the center as 𝐰′=𝐰¯+ψ​(𝐰−𝐰¯)superscript𝐰′¯𝐰𝜓𝐰¯𝐰{\bf w}^{\prime}={\bf\bar{w}}+\psi({\bf w}-{\bf\bar{w}}), where ψ<1𝜓1\psi<1. While Brock et al. [5] observe that only a subset of networks is amenable to such truncation even when orthogonal regularization is used, truncation in 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} space seems to work reliably even without changes to the loss function.
items.zh: 我们可以遵循类似的策略。首先，计算𝒲的质心为𝐰̄ = 𝔼_{𝐳∼P(𝐳)}[f(𝐳)]。在FFHQ的情况下，这个点代表一种平均脸（图8，ψ=0）。然后，我们可以将给定𝐰与中心的偏差缩放为𝐰' = 𝐰̄ + ψ(𝐰 - 𝐰̄)，其中ψ<1。虽然Brock等人[5]观察到，即使使用正交正则化，也只有一部分网络适用于这种截断，但在𝒲空间中的截断似乎即使不改变损失函数也能可靠地工作。

items.capEn: Figure 8: The effect of truncation trick as a function of style scale ψ𝜓\psi. When we fade ψ→0→𝜓0\psi\rightarrow 0, all faces converge to the “mean” face of FFHQ. This face is similar for all trained networks, and the interpolation towards it never seems to cause artifacts. By applying negative scaling to styles, we get the corresponding opposite or “anti-face”. It is interesting that various high-level attributes often flip between the opposites, including viewpoint, glasses, age, coloring, hair length, and often gender.
items.capZh: 图8：截断技巧随风格缩放因子ψ变化的效果。当ψ→0时，所有人脸收敛到FFHQ的“平均”脸。这个脸对于所有训练过的网络都是相似的，并且向它的插值似乎从未引起伪影。通过对风格应用负缩放，我们得到相应的相反或“反脸”。有趣的是，各种高级属性通常在相反之间翻转，包括视角、眼镜、年龄、颜色、头发长度，通常还有性别。

full.sec: Appendix C Hyperparameters and training details
full.secZh: 附录C 超参数与训练细节

items.en: We build upon the official TensorFlow [1] implementation of Progressive GANs by Karras et al. [30], from which we inherit most of the training details.333https://github.com/tkarras/progressive_growing_of_gans This original setup corresponds to configuration a in Table 1. In particular, we use the same discriminator architecture, resolution-dependent minibatch sizes, Adam [33] hyperparameters, and exponential moving average of the generator. We enable mirror augmentation for CelebA-HQ and FFHQ, but disable it for LSUN. Our training time is approximately one week on an NVIDIA DGX-1 with 8 Tesla V100 GPUs.
items.zh: 我们基于Karras等人[30]的Progressive GANs的官方TensorFlow[1]实现构建，继承了大部分训练细节。3该原始设置对应于表1中的配置a。具体来说，我们使用相同的判别器架构、依赖于分辨率的小批量大小、Adam[33]超参数以及生成器的指数移动平均。我们对CelebA-HQ和FFHQ启用镜像增强，但对LSUN禁用。我们的训练时间大约为一周，使用配备8块Tesla V100 GPU的NVIDIA DGX-1。

items.en: For our improved baseline (b in Table 1), we make several modifications to improve the overall result quality. We replace the nearest-neighbor up/downsampling in both networks with bilinear sampling, which we implement by low-pass filtering the activations with a separable 2nd order binomial filter after each upsampling layer and before each downsampling layer [64]. We implement progressive growing the same way as Karras et al. [30], but we start from 82superscript828^{2} images instead of 42superscript424^{2}. For the FFHQ dataset, we switch from WGAN-GP to the non-saturating loss [22] with R1subscript𝑅1R_{1} regularization [44] using γ=10𝛾10\gamma=10. With R1subscript𝑅1R_{1} we found that the FID scores keep decreasing for considerably longer than with WGAN-GP, and we thus increase the training time from 12M to 25M images. We use the same learning rates as Karras et al. [30] for FFHQ, but we found that setting the learning rate to 0.002 instead of 0.003 for 5122superscript5122512^{2} and 10242superscript102421024^{2} leads to better stability with CelebA-HQ.
items.zh: 对于我们的改进基线（表1中的b），我们进行了几项修改以提高整体结果质量。我们将两个网络中的最近邻上/下采样替换为双线性采样，通过在每次上采样层之后和每次下采样层之前使用可分离的二阶二项式滤波器对激活进行低通滤波来实现[64]。我们以与Karras等人[30]相同的方式实现渐进式增长，但从8^2图像开始，而不是4^2。对于FFHQ数据集，我们从WGAN-GP切换到非饱和损失[22]和R1正则化[44]，γ=10。使用R1时，我们发现FID分数比使用WGAN-GP时持续下降更长时间，因此我们将训练时间从1200万张图像增加到2500万张。我们对FFHQ使用与Karras等人[30]相同的学习率，但发现对于512^2和1024^2，将学习率设置为0.002而不是0.003可以带来更好的稳定性。

items.en: For our style-based generator (f in Table 1), we use leaky ReLU [41] with α=0.2𝛼0.2\alpha=0.2 and equalized learning rate [30] for all layers. We use the same feature map counts in our convolution layers as Karras et al. [30]. Our mapping network consists of 8 fully-connected layers, and the dimensionality of all input and output activations — including 𝐳𝐳{\bf z} and 𝐰𝐰{\bf w} — is 512. We found that increasing the depth of the mapping network tends to make the training unstable with high learning rates. We thus reduce the learning rate by two orders of magnitude for the mapping network, i.e., λ′=0.01⋅λsuperscript𝜆′⋅0.01𝜆\lambda^{\prime}=0.01\cdot\lambda. We initialize all weights of the convolutional, fully-connected, and affine transform layers using 𝒩​(0,1)𝒩01\mathcal{N}(0,1). The constant input in synthesis network is initialized to one. The biases and noise scaling factors are initialized to zero, except for the biases associated with 𝐲ssubscript𝐲𝑠{\bf y}_{s} that we initialize to one.
items.zh: 对于我们的基于风格的生成器（表1中的f），我们在所有层中使用leaky ReLU [41]，α=0.2，以及均衡学习率[30]。我们在卷积层中使用与Karras等人[30]相同的特征图数量。我们的映射网络由8个全连接层组成，所有输入和输出激活（包括𝐳和𝐰）的维度为512。我们发现增加映射网络的深度往往会导致高学习率下的训练不稳定。因此，我们将映射网络的学习率降低两个数量级，即λ'=0.01·λ。我们使用𝒩(0,1)初始化卷积层、全连接层和仿射变换层的所有权重。合成网络中的常数输入初始化为1。偏置和噪声缩放因子初始化为0，但与𝐲_s相关的偏置初始化为1。

items.en: The classifiers used by our separability metric (Section 4.2) have the same architecture as our discriminator except that minibatch standard deviation [30] is disabled. We use the learning rate of 10−3superscript10310^{-3}, minibatch size of 8, Adam optimizer, and training length of 150,000 images. The classifiers are trained independently of generators, and the same 40 classifiers, one for each CelebA attribute, are used for measuring the separability metric for all generators. We will release the pre-trained classifier networks so that our measurements can be reproduced.
items.zh: 我们的可分离性度量（第4.2节）使用的分类器具有与判别器相同的架构，但禁用了小批量标准差[30]。我们使用学习率10^{-3}、小批量大小8、Adam优化器，训练长度为150,000张图像。分类器独立于生成器进行训练，并且相同的40个分类器（每个CelebA属性一个）用于测量所有生成器的可分离性度量。我们将发布预训练的分类器网络，以便可以重现我们的测量结果。

items.capEn: Figure 9: FID and perceptual path length metrics over the course of training in our configurations b and f using the FFHQ dataset. Horizontal axis denotes the number of training images seen by the discriminator. The dashed vertical line at 8.4M images marks the point when training has progressed to full 10242superscript102421024^{2} resolution. On the right, we show only one curve for the traditional generator’s path length measurements, because there is no discernible difference between full-path and endpoint sampling in 𝒵𝒵\mathcal{Z}.
items.capZh: 图9：使用FFHQ数据集在配置b和f的训练过程中FID和感知路径长度指标。横轴表示判别器看到的训练图像数量。在840万张图像处的垂直虚线标记训练已进行到完整1024^2分辨率的时间点。右侧，我们仅显示传统生成器路径长度测量的一条曲线，因为在𝒵中全路径和端点采样之间没有明显差异。

items.en: We do not use batch normalization [29], spectral normalization [45], attention mechanisms [63], dropout [59], or pixelwise feature vector normalization [30] in our networks.
items.zh: 我们的网络中不使用批归一化[29]、谱归一化[45]、注意力机制[63]、dropout[59]或逐像素特征向量归一化[30]。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Uncurated set of images produced by our style-based generator (config f) with the LSUN Bedroom dataset at 2562superscript2562256^{2}. FID computed for 50K images was 2.65.
items.capZh: 图10：我们的基于风格的生成器（配置f）在LSUN Bedroom数据集上以256^2分辨率生成的一组未经筛选的图像。50K图像的FID计算值为2.65。

items.en: These datasets were trained using the same setup as FFHQ for the duration of 70M images for Bedroom and Cats, and 46M for Cars. We suspect that the results for Bedroom are starting to approach the limits of the training data, as in many images the most objectionable issues are the severe compression artifacts that have been inherited from the low-quality training data. Cars has much higher quality training data that also allows higher spatial resolution (512×384512384512\times 384 instead of 2562superscript2562256^{2}), and Cats continues to be a difficult dataset due to the high intrinsic variation in poses, zoom levels, and backgrounds.
items.zh: 这些数据集使用与FFHQ相同的设置进行训练，Bedroom和Cats的训练时长为7000万张图像，Cars为4600万张。我们怀疑Bedroom的结果开始接近训练数据的极限，因为在许多图像中，最令人反感的问题是继承自低质量训练数据的严重压缩伪影。Cars具有更高质量的训练数据，也允许更高的空间分辨率（512×384而不是256^2），而Cats由于姿势、缩放级别和背景的高度内在变化，仍然是一个困难的数据集。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Uncurated set of images produced by our style-based generator (config f) with the LSUN Car dataset at 512×384512384512\times 384. FID computed for 50K images was 3.27.
items.capZh: 图11：我们的基于风格的生成器（配置f）在LSUN Car数据集上以512×384分辨率生成的一组未经筛选的图像。50K图像的FID计算值为3.27。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Uncurated set of images produced by our style-based generator (config f) with the LSUN Cat dataset at 2562superscript2562256^{2}. FID computed for 50K images was 8.53.
items.capZh: 图12：我们的基于风格的生成器（配置f）在LSUN Cat数据集上以256^2分辨率生成的一组未经筛选的图像。50K图像的FID计算值为8.53。
